ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Process Creation, Authorization Policy Change) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the event */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the source where the event was generated */,
  "destination_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the destination (if applicable) */,
  "source_port" INTEGER /* Port number of the source (if applicable) */,
  "destination_port" INTEGER /* Port number of the destination (if applicable) */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the event (e.g., Info, Warning, Critical) */,
  "event_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the event (e.g., Success, Failure) */,
  "event_source" TEXT /* Source of the event (e.g., Application, System) */,
  "event_log_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the event log entry */,
  "event_record_id" INTEGER /* Record ID of the event in the Windows event log */,
  "event_channel" TEXT /* Channel from which the event was generated (e.g., Security, Application) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type FOREIGN KEY ("event_type") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the event type (e.g., Security, System, Application) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the event type (e.g., Authentication, Policy Change) */,
  "criticality" TEXT /* Criticality level of the event type (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "mitigation_steps" TEXT /* Steps to mitigate the impact of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role assigned to the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for notifications */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of event being analyzed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was performed */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of events for the given type */,
  "average_response_time" REAL /* Average response time for the given type */,
  "event_source" TEXT /* Source of the events being analyzed */,
  "event_channel" TEXT /* Channel from which the events were generated */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the events being analyzed */,
  "event_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the events being analyzed */,
  "max_response_time" REAL /* Maximum response time for the events being analyzed */,
  "min_response_time" REAL /* Minimum response time for the events being analyzed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_analysis_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the dashboard */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Whether the dashboard is public or private */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Dashboard where the alert is displayed */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of event that triggers the alert */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., Info, Warning, Critical) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., Active, Resolved) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "alert_triggered" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_resolved" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  "alert_priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the alert (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, configuration change) */,
  "activity_status" TEXT /* Status of the activity (e.g., Success, Failure) */,
  "activity_source" TEXT /* Source of the activity (e.g., Web, API) */,
  "activity_ip" TEXT /* IP address where the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
